description: Letter from ʿAyyāsh b. Ṣedaqa, from Fustat, to Nahray b. Nissim, Busir. Around 1054. Nahray is in Busir and buys flax with the help of Qāsim. ʿAyyāsh sends him instructions and advice. Also mentions details about ship movements, including ships from Mahdiyya and Sicily. Also mentions the government's new decrees and an incident in which the state confiscated ships and goods. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #479) VMR
